description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a stylized, low-polygon form. The figure appears to be in a dynamic walking posture, with one leg extended forward and the arms slightly bent at the sides. The body is elongated, and the proportions suggest an adult human, though the details are abstracted and angular. The clothing is form-fitting, with a clear distinction between the upper and lower body, and the figure seems to be wearing a jacket or coat over pants. The head is small and smoothly contoured, with no visible facial features or hair details. Accessories or carried items are not apparent, and the overall appearance is minimalist and geometric.
description: A stylized, low-polygon adult pedestrian in a walking pose, wearing a jacket and pants with a minimalist, angular form.
description_view_0: The view shows the back and top of the figure, highlighting the broad shoulders and the angular lines of the jacket.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the extended arm and leg, showing the dynamic walking posture and the separation between the upper and lower body.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the other arm and leg, with the angular contours of the clothing and the smooth, featureless head.
description_view_3: The front and side of the figure are visible, displaying the forward stride and the overall geometric simplicity of the form.
